pharma.title: India needs to remain attractive for innovation-led investment: Judith Love, Novartis
pharma.summary: With an eye on India's blossoming market, Novartis is set to launch pioneering therapies, including radioligand and gene therapies. The company underscores the importance of collaboration to tackle obstacles like high costs and inadequate infrastructure.
